nasb.text: And the Spirit lifted me up and brought me into the inner court; and behold, the glory of the Lord filled the house.

esv.text: the Spirit lifted me up and brought me into the inner court; and behold, the glory of the Lord filled the temple.

cnv.text: 靈把我提起來，領我進了內院。我看見耶和華的榮耀充滿了殿。

ccb.text: 上帝的灵把我举起，带我进入内院，耶和华的荣光充满圣殿。
